doc_go_contract: native Go parser registry, language adapters, and SCIP reduction support used to extract source-level entities and metadata
invariant: parsers must be deterministic given the same source bytes; fact truth must be preserved on retries and repair runs

key_types.Engine: dispatches parse and pre-scan calls to language adapters; wraps Registry + Runtime
key_types.Registry: immutable catalog of Definition entries; indexed by parser key, extension, exact name, prefix name
key_types.Definition: one parser contract: ParserKey, Language, Extensions, ExactNames, PrefixNames
key_types.Runtime: caches tree-sitter language handles (sync.Mutex protected); Languages: C, C#, C++, Go, Java, JS, Python, Rust, Scala, TypeScript
key_types.Options: configures one parse execution: IndexSource bool, VariableScope string
key_types.SCIPIndexer: runs external scip-* CLI; LookPath + RunCommand + Timeout
key_types.SCIPIndexParser: parses generated SCIP index protobuf into SCIPParseResult
key_types.SCIPParseResult: parsed SCIP index output for downstream fact emission

engine_entry_points.NewEngine: constructs Engine from provided Registry + Runtime
engine_entry_points.ParsePath: repoRoot + path + isDependency + Options -> map[string]any; routes to language adapter via Registry.LookupByPath
engine_entry_points.PreScanRepositoryPathsWithWorkers: concurrent prescan with bounded worker pool; results sorted by input order

registry_lookup.LookupByPath: base name -> ExactNames -> PrefixNames -> extension; .tfvars.json -> hcl special case
registry_lookup.Definitions: returns cloned definitions in deterministic parser-key order

scip_support.SCIPIndexer: detects available scip-* binaries via LookPath; runs external indexer; returns generated index path
scip_support.DetectSCIPProjectLanguage: returns dominant SCIP-capable language from file paths, constrained to allowed set
scip_support.SCIPIndexParser: parses protobuf SCIP index file into SCIPParseResult for downstream fact emission

prescan_concurrency.concurrent: preScanPathsConcurrent: job channel -> worker pool -> sorted results by input index
prescan_concurrency.determinism: results sorted by original input order before merge; per-name paths sorted

content_metadata.inferContentMetadata: called after ParsePath; sets artifact_type, template_dialect, iac_relevant on payload

telemetry: parser does not emit metrics or spans directly; callers (NativeRepositorySnapshotter) record pcg_dp_file_parse_duration_seconds via Instruments.FileParseDuration
dependencies: tree-sitter grammar bindings for C, C#, C++, Go, Java, JS, Python, Rust, Scala, TypeScript
